snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Diagnostics Windows content-digest destination binding replacement review
reviewers.independence: The independent replacement reviewer examined the frozen discriminated binding, Windows stable digest readback, POSIX held-descriptor fence, successor cases, cleanup and packaged evidence and returned CLEAR before this rebind.

dimensions.summary: Existing Diagnostics, API, Quality and B1.14 acceptance owners locate preview, export, cancellation and residual boundaries without a new document or product surface.

Owners agree on sender binding, bounded worker output, one exact POSIX held-descriptor or Windows bounded-digest shape, changed-byte successor rejection, exact-content Windows replacement, cancellation and body-free evidence.
Six exact selectors update only existing partial PIGE-DIAG-002 and E1.07 projections; semantic lock v3 has 1,197 claims and every Requirement, Exit and phase status remains unchanged.

Development gets one executable cross-platform contract: POSIX retains descriptor fencing; Windows closes stable bounded readback, rejects changed bytes and permits exact-content-equivalent replacement without a deny-delete handle.
No Markdown file or decision is added; owner replacement text and semantic-neutral manifest compression keep every leanness budget unchanged and green.

verification.evidence: The exact 24-path Development plus governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package and distribution evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 4/51, full 106/1,223, typecheck/build, built worker and macOS package/distribution smokes pass. The 160,609,459-byte artifact preserves packaged renderer, preload, Pi and workers.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 57 dependency records with zero waivers; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,197 pass with no Requirement, Exit or phase status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass after the platform-binding owner and evidence replacement without adding a document or raising any budget.

coordination.taskTitle: Diagnostics Windows content-digest destination binding replacement
coordination.compatibility: This replacement uses a bounded content digest on Windows and retains the POSIX held-descriptor fence without weakening success, rejection, cancellation, redaction, local-only export, dependencies or statuses.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze the six-path replacement and final 24-path identities; independent review returned CLEAR. Product Planning minimally rebound existing owners, exact evidence, semantic lock and this recipe without changing Development files.

nonBlockingRisks: Optional reviewed bundle content, progress and restart-resumable export semantics remain open.
Real Windows Packageability remains required before merge; replacement Linux/macOS PR gates also remain publication evidence.
Final check-to-rename and release-to-unlink syscall intervals remain open; the export stays process-local rather than a durable Job.
